title: Paviyettante Madhurachooral
overview: In a small village of Kerala live Pavithran master and Annie teacher who teach at Chandanapara high school. Popular for their farming and nature-friendly life, the couple is highly respected in the village. One fine morning, a fifteen-year-old boy named Anandu enters their lives. What follows is how their life changes after the arrival of the boy.
